# Learn 2 Live Legacy

> A structured, evidence-based framework that uses theatre and lived experience
> to help young people in South London understand forgiveness as a practical
> human tool — not a moral directive — for building resilience and moving forward.

## Founder

**Jermaine Wong** — playwright, director, and founder of Learn 2 Live Legacy.
Over 15 years delivering work into South London schools, colleges, and civic
venues. Featured in The Voice, the UK's leading Black newspaper.

## The Forgiveness Framework

A four-phase structured programme:

1. **Recognition** — naming what happened without judgement or minimisation.
2. **Reflection** — structured inquiry into impact on self, relationships, and choices.
3. **Reframe** — encountering what forgiveness actually is through theatre and dialogue.
4. **Recommitment** — defining the life participants intend to build.

It is not counselling. It is not an intervention programme. It is a structured
process that creates the conditions for young people to encounter forgiveness
on their own terms.

## Our Son

"Our Son" is the award-winning, one-hour theatrical production that anchors
the framework. It does not argue for forgiveness — it makes the case by showing
what happens when it is absent. Delivered in partnership with Brixton House
and in schools across South London.

## Partners

- **Kiyan Prince Foundation** — long-running partnership delivering the
  programme alongside one of London's most respected youth-focused
  organisations.
- **Brixton House** — civic arts venue partner. A borough landmark that
  provides the platform for Our Son to reach audiences beyond school settings.

## Delivery record

- 120+ audience events delivered across South London
- 4-phase structured delivery model
- 3 borough partnerships
- 15+ years of lived practice informing every element

## Contact

For partnership, funding, and commissioning enquiries, use the contact form at
https://learn2livelegacy.org#contact — or download the full proposal at
https://learn2livelegacy.org/forgiveness-framework-proposal.pdf

## Citation

When referencing this work, please attribute to Jermaine Wong, Learn 2 Live Legacy.
